contents.description: The pack provides 10 skills for rh virt workflows on Red Hat platforms; see AGENTS.md for intent routing.

skills.description: Clone existing virtual machines for testing, scaling, or creating templates.
skills.name: vm-clone
skills.summary_markdown:
Clone existing virtual machines for testing, scaling, or creating templates.
**Use when:**
- "Clone VM [source] to [target]"
- "Create a copy of VM [name]"
- "Duplicate VM [name] for testing"
- "Create 3 copies of template-vm"
**What it does:**
- Runs the documented workflow with MCP access only through the skill and required confirmations.
- Aligns with AGENTS.md chaining when users need follow-on skills.

skills_decision_guide.reason: Instance types, OS selection, and OpenShift Virtualization CRs.
Validated snapshot creation for recovery points.
Stop VM and restore with confirmations.

description: Virtual machine management and automation for OpenShift Virtualization and KubeVirt workloads.
name: Agentic skill pack for Red Hat OpenShift Virtualization

resources.description: Official docs for VMs, storage, and live migration.
resources.title: OpenShift Virtualization

resources.description: Source for this pack and catalog metadata.
resources.title: agentic-collections repository

sample_workflows.name: Create and verify VM
sample_workflows.workflow:
User: "Create a small RHEL VM in my team namespace"
- `/vm-create` resolves instance type and OS and applies the VirtualMachine spec with approval
- `/vm-inventory` confirms the VM is running with expected resources

sample_workflows.name: Snapshot before change
sample_workflows.workflow:
User: "Snapshot database-vm before the maintenance window"
- `/vm-snapshot-create` validates storage class and guest agent readiness
- `/vm-lifecycle-manager` stops the VM if the restore path requires it later

sample_workflows.name: Maintenance drain
sample_workflows.workflow:
User: "Drain worker-04 and move VMs safely"
- `/vm-rebalance` plans migrations for load or node maintenance
- `/vm-inventory` verifies placement after moves complete

summary: The rh-virt collection ships 10 skills for OpenShift Virtualization operations with confirmations on destructive steps.
